name: qa-architect-agent
description: Multi-layer QA framework with 5 specialized agents: qa-architect (orchestrator + scope wizard), qa-frontend (Playwright E2E), qa-backend (k6: REST/WS/GraphQL/gRPC + optional load testing), qa-mobile (Maestro: Flutter/React Native), qa-cybersecurity (OWASP Top 10, ZAP, Frida, SQLMap). One plugin, full-stack QA coverage.
